purpose: Define a portable quantum experiment receipt that prevents simulator, noisy-simulator, mock-hardware, and cloud-hardware evidence from being promoted across branch boundaries.

verification_layers.receipt_requirement: Reference the theorem, identity, or formal claim being probed.
verification_layers.non_promotion_rule: A simulator receipt can support a bounded witness, not a new theorem unless a separate formal proof receipt exists.

verification_layers.receipt_requirement: Record source state, qubit count, operations, gate count, two-qubit gate count, and depth.
verification_layers.non_promotion_rule: Circuit equality is not backend equality; the same circuit can have exact, noisy, mock, and hardware receipts.

verification_layers.receipt_requirement: Record SDK or adapter identity and deterministic seed or analytic mode.
verification_layers.non_promotion_rule: SDK execution is not automatically portable across simulator or hardware branches.

verification_layers.receipt_requirement: Record backend branch, simulator or hardware identity, shot mode, and noise model.
verification_layers.non_promotion_rule: Noisy simulator and hardware-mock branches cannot be cited as cloud-hardware results.

verification_layers.receipt_requirement: Record logical qubits, physical-qubit assumption, gate count, depth, QEC scheme, and runtime estimate.
verification_layers.non_promotion_rule: A resource estimate is a planning artifact until tied to an executed backend receipt.

verification_layers.receipt_requirement: Record statevector, density-mixture summary, histogram, fidelity, or task-result reference as applicable.
verification_layers.non_promotion_rule: Histogram equality alone is insufficient when phase-sensitive or amplitude-sensitive claims are at issue.

verification_layers.receipt_requirement: Expose branch labels and a hardware_claim_allowed boolean in every receipt.
verification_layers.non_promotion_rule: Any branch-crossing claim must be rejected unless a new receipt explicitly binds the target branch.

verification_layers.receipt_requirement: Attach verifier, Crucible, Forum, or independent reproduction verdicts when available.
verification_layers.non_promotion_rule: A missing external verdict must be marked UNVERIFIABLE, not silently inferred.

source_anchors.used_for: Noise model and noisy-simulator branch semantics.
Backend-derived and explicit noise model receipt fields.
Noisy simulation and Kraus-channel branch semantics.
Cloud task, status, and result receipt boundaries.
Simulator noise-model evidence boundaries across cloud-style quantum workflows.

non_promotion_policy.hardware_result: Forbidden unless branch is CLOUD_HARDWARE and hardware_claim_allowed is true.
non_promotion_policy.quantum_advantage: Forbidden in this schema unless a separate benchmark receipt binds classical baseline, quantum backend, cost, calibration, and verifier verdict.
non_promotion_policy.theorem_promotion: Forbidden from an experiment receipt alone; requires an explicit proof packet or formal-verifier receipt.
non_promotion_policy.market_claim: Any uniqueness or category-leadership claim must remain a hypothesis unless backed by a documented comparison matrix.
